question: Will the S&P 500 be above 6924.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?

While this is challenging, recent market volatility has produced similar moves - the index just gained 2.52% in one session following ceasefire news. Given ongoing geopolitical developments and potential for positive catalysts, an 8% probability seems more reasonable than the 3% market price.
